title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: 完了した範囲は明確です。`reauth 修正` を超えて、`Happy.app をスマホ向け Kernel control surface に寄せる` 目標へ計画を組み直し、その目標に沿って実装と gate を更新しました。 主要変更: - ゴール/exit criteria/シミュレーション/批判レビューを [kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md) に再定義しました。軸は `login clarity`、`concurrent task visibility`、`task-bound NL control`、`provider/cost/comms visibility` です。 - `Happy` 本体に access panel、task topology、telemetry、task-bound follow-up composer を追加しました。[index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/index.html) [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/app.js) [styles.css](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/styles.css) - state/intake 側を拡張して、task-bound instruction が既存 task に束縛されるようにしました。`task_binding_id`、task communications、task/global telemetry を追加しています。[happy-app-intake.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js) [happy-app-state.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-state.js) [happy-event-normalizers.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-normalizers.js) [happy-state-projector.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-state-projector.js) [mock-kernel-state.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/data/mock-kernel-state.js) - clean worktree を誤読する hard-coded tests も相対パス化し、goal gate を広げました。[test-kernel-happy-goal-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/tests/test-kernel-happy-goal-gate.sh) 追加・更新した検証: - [test-control-surface.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-control-surface.js) - [test-task-instruction.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-task-instruction.js) - [test-behavior-contract.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-behavior-contract.js) - [test-view-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh) - [test-state-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh) - [test-design-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-design-contract.sh) - [test-pwa-shell.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh) - [test-event-store-compaction.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-event-store-compaction.js) - [test-kernel-context-governor.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/tests/test-kernel-context-governor.sh) 通した確認: - `node --check apps/happy-web/src/app.js` - `node apps/happy-web/tests/test-control-surface.js` - `node apps/happy-web/tests/test-task-instruction.js` - `node apps/happy-web/tests/test-behavior-contract.js` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-design-contract.sh` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh` - `node apps/happy-web/tests/test-event-store-compaction.js` - `bash tests/test-kernel-context-governor.sh` - `bash tests/test-kernel-happy-goal-gate.sh` 批判的吟味で出た問題と解決...
